# US-04: Reject with feedback and follow-up proposal

> PRD: [028 — Correction Proposal Engine](README.md)
> Status: Not started

## Description

As a user, I want to reject a proposal and tell the system why it is wrong, so that the next proposal is better and I don’t need to micro-manage patterns.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The user can reject a bundled ChangeSet proposal.
- [ ] Rejection requires a short free-text feedback message.
- [ ] Rejection applies no rule changes.
- [ ] The system can generate a follow-up proposal that incorporates the feedback and presents a new bundled ChangeSet with an updated impact preview.
- [ ] The UI clearly distinguishes the follow-up proposal from the rejected one.
